hero.subtitle: Strategy, design, and technology — built to scale your brand and dominate your market.

services.title: Solutions built for growth
services.subtitle: From brand identity to paid ads, we cover every touchpoint of your digital presence.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.description: Landing pages, multi-page websites, and custom web applications crafted with modern technology and built for performance.
webdev.fullDescription: We build fast, modern websites that don't just look great — they perform. From single landing pages designed to convert, to full multi-page business sites and custom web applications, every project is hand-coded with the latest technology. No templates. No page builders. Just clean, optimized code built for speed, SEO, and scalability.

branding.title: Branding & Identity
branding.description: Complete brand creation or integration of your existing brand into a stunning digital presence. Logo, colors, typography, and beyond.
branding.fullDescription: Your brand is more than a logo — it's the feeling people get when they interact with your business. We create complete brand identities from scratch, or work with your existing brand to build a cohesive digital presence. Every color, font, and visual element is chosen with purpose to make your brand unforgettable.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.description: SEO optimization, Meta and Google Ads campaigns, and custom growth strategies to put your business in front of the right people.
marketing.fullDescription: Getting found online isn't luck — it's strategy. We combine SEO, paid advertising, and data-driven growth tactics to put your business in front of the people who matter most. Every campaign is tracked, measured, and optimized to maximize your return on investment.

social.title: Social Media
social.description: Content creation, professional video editing, and full account management to keep your brand active and engaging.
social.fullDescription: Your social media presence is your brand's daily conversation with the world. We handle everything — from creating scroll-stopping content and editing professional videos to managing your accounts and engaging with your audience. You focus on running your business; we'll make sure your brand stays active and relevant.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: Hosting, maintenance, weekly performance reviews, and Google Business Profile management. We're with you after launch.
support.fullDescription: Launching is just the beginning. We stay with you after go-live with reliable hosting, proactive maintenance, and weekly check-ins to review your performance and plan next steps. Think of us as your long-term digital partner, not a one-time vendor.

process.title: From idea to impact
process.subtitle: A proven, transparent process that takes your project from concept to results — no surprises.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We learn your business, goals, audience, and competitive landscape.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: A custom roadmap is built around your specific objectives and budget.

design.title: Design
design.description: Wireframes, mockups, and brand elements come to life for your approval.

development.title: Development
development.description: Your project is built with modern tech, optimized for speed and SEO.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Rigorous testing, final tweaks, and a smooth go-live day.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: Ongoing optimization, performance tracking, and strategic scaling.

tailored.title: Tailored Strategy
tailored.description: No cookie-cutter solutions. Every plan is built from scratch based on your unique goals and market.

weekly.title: Weekly Check-ins
weekly.description: We meet with you every week to review performance, adjust tactics, and make sure you're in the loop.

performance.title: Performance-First
performance.description: Every design choice, every line of code, every ad dollar — optimized for measurable results.

fullService.title: Full-Service Agency
fullService.description: Branding, development, marketing, social media — one team handling everything seamlessly.

postLaunch.title: Post-Launch Support
postLaunch.description: Free first-month support, ongoing maintenance, and a dedicated team that doesn't disappear after delivery.

portfolio.title: Projects that speak for themselves
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of brands and experiences we've crafted.
portfolio.comingSoonSubtitle: We're curating a fresh selection. Check back shortly.

contact.title: Let's build something great
contact.paragraph1: Every business is unique. We take the time to understand your goals before recommending a solution. No templates. No guesswork. Just strategy.
contact.paragraph2: Reach out and let's start a conversation about your growth.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to discuss a project.

status.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Strategy, design, and growth — built for brands that move fast.

luxor.aboutBody: A premium brand built to represent the highest standard — not just in products and services, but in experience, status, and perceived value. Luxor exists to elevate what it means to live with excellence.

mvp.title: Mission
mvp.text: Deliver high-level products and services with excellence and exclusivity in every interaction.

mvp.title: Vision
mvp.text: Be a global reference in luxury and prestige, recognized for uncompromising quality.

mvp.title: Purpose
mvp.text: Elevate the standard of experience and sophistication in every consumer interaction.

luxor.positioningTitle: A brand for those who demand the best
luxor.positioningSubtitle: Luxor is not about selling a product — it's about offering a premium solution with sophistication and high standards that transcend functionality.
luxor.personalitySubtitle: Elegant, confident, selective, refined, and dominant — a presence that doesn't need to shout to be noticed.

personality.title: Elegant & Confident
personality.description: A striking presence without effort. Luxor's confidence is natural, never forced.

personality.title: Selective & Refined
personality.description: Every detail is intentional. Every decision is deliberate.

personality.title: Dominant & Authoritative
personality.description: Leads by example. True luxury doesn't shout — it simply is.

luxor.rulerBody: The Ruler represents power, control, and status. It's the archetype of authority that sets standards and defines what is considered excellent. Luxor doesn't follow trends — it defines them.
luxor.loverBody: The Lover brings desire, aesthetics, and sensory experience. It's the archetype that transforms luxury into something visceral and emotional. Luxor is not just admired — it is desired.
luxor.identityTitle: A visual language that speaks for itself
luxor.styleBody: Subtle metallic shines, clean compositions, and dark backgrounds with gold elements create premium contrast and immediate distinction.
luxor.symbolBody: A strong symbol that communicates authority. Dark background with golden elements creates premium contrast and immediate impact.
luxor.saysBody: Exclusivity, high standards, and differentiation. Every message reinforces that Luxor is in a category of its own.
luxor.howBody: With authority and elegance. The tone is sophisticated, direct, and confident. No exaggeration — because true luxury doesn't need to shout.
luxor.createsBody: Desire, status, and belonging. Luxor creates the feeling that being part of this universe is an achievement — and rare achievements have incomparable value.
luxor.experienceSubtitle: And that's the point. Selectivity is a fundamental part of Luxor's value. The brand must be experienced as something rare, earned, a privilege of the few.

experience.title: Privilege
experience.description: Access to Luxor is a distinction. Every interaction reinforces that the client is part of a select group.

experience.title: Desire
experience.description: Luxor creates desire before the purchase. The brand experience begins long before the first contact with the product.

experience.title: Achievement
experience.description: Owning or accessing Luxor is an achievement. The brand transforms consumption into a symbol of success.

luxor.closingQuote: Luxor is a symbol of status. It transforms product into desire and experience into prestige.
luxor.ctaTitle: Interested in a luxury brand like this?
luxor.ctaBody: Let's craft a premium identity that elevates your brand to a category of its own.

phoenix.aboutBody: A brand born to protect people, data, and systems — with the strength of rebirth and the precision of modern technology. Like the phoenix, it represents rebirth, strength, and the ability to reinvent itself constantly.

essence.title: Purpose
essence.text: Protect people, data, and systems with intelligence and innovation.

essence.title: Mission
essence.text: Offer reliable, technological security in real time.

essence.title: Vision
essence.text: Be a reference in digital security and advanced protection.

phoenix.positioningSubtitle: Phoenix is a security network for companies and people who need reliable, intelligent protection — offering advanced technological solutions with agility, precision, and constant evolution.

personality.title: Strategic
personality.description: Thinks ahead, anticipates risks, and acts with precision before the problem happens.

personality.title: Intelligent
personality.description: Analyzes, learns, and evolves with each new threat — never stagnant.

personality.title: Vigilant
personality.description: Present 24/7, with constant attention and immediate response.

personality.title: Secure & Futuristic
personality.description: Transmits confidence with cutting-edge technology and modern language.

phoenix.toneBody: Direct, Confident, Technical (without being complicated), Modern
phoenix.heroBody: Phoenix protects, resolves, and faces risks with courage and determination. It is present in critical moments to ensure the client comes out stronger.
phoenix.sageBody: With intelligence, analysis, and precision, Phoenix makes data-driven decisions based on knowledge — not reaction, but strategy.

message.title: What It Says
message.text: Security, technology, protection, and control — with authority and clarity.

message.title: How It Says It
message.text: With a direct, confident, and technical tone — modern without being complicated.

message.title: What It Creates
message.text: A sense of security, confidence, and total control in the client.

phoenix.styleBody: Futuristic, Minimalist, High-tech — with energy lines, digital grids, and technological interfaces.
phoenix.closingTitle: More than a network — a system that evolves
phoenix.closingQuote: Phoenix is not just a security network — it's a system that evolves, learns, and continuously protects. It transforms security into strategic intelligence.
phoenix.ctaTitle: Need a brand that commands security and trust?
phoenix.ctaBody: Let's build an identity that protects, evolves, and positions your brand as a leader.

pecaai.tagline: Complete Brand Identity — Automotive Parts Marketplace
pecaai.aboutBody: PeçaAí is a marketplace app designed for auto repair shops — think Uber Eats for car parts. We created the complete brand identity from scratch, including logo, color system, typography, tone of voice, and a full brand deck.

problems.title: Idle Cars
problems.description: Clients waiting while shops waste time calling suppliers one by one.

problems.title: Wrong Parts
problems.description: Miscommunication leads to rework, returns, and extra cost for everyone.

problems.title: Slow Process
problems.description: Manual ordering slows down the entire workshop workflow.

pecaai.solutionSubtitle: Three simple steps that replace dozens of phone calls.

steps.title: Smart Search
steps.description: Type the code or model — the system finds compatible parts instantly.

steps.title: Compare Prices
steps.description: See offers from verified suppliers side by side, in seconds.

steps.title: Order & Receive
steps.description: Quick confirmation, real-time tracking, delivery on schedule.

pecaai.typographyBody: Clean, highly legible, and versatile — perfect for a product that needs to communicate quickly and clearly.
pecaai.approachBody: Inspired by the best delivery and marketplace apps. Every element is designed to reduce friction and get mechanics back to work faster.

voicePillars.title: Straight to the Point
voicePillars.description: No marketing fluff. We speak the language of those who work with greasy hands and need results.

voicePillars.title: Technical When Needed
voicePillars.description: We know part codes, specifications, and compatibility. You don't need to explain the obvious.

voicePillars.title: Partner, Not Seller
voicePillars.description: We're here to make your day easier, not to push product. Your success is our success.

whyChoose.title: Save Time
whyChoose.description: Fewer calls, less waiting, more cars done by end of day.

whyChoose.title: Verified Suppliers
whyChoose.description: Work only with trusted stores and guaranteed quality.

whyChoose.title: Best Price
whyChoose.description: Compare real-time offers and choose the best deal.

pecaai.ctaTitle: Interested in a brand identity like this?
pecaai.ctaBody: Let's craft a unique identity that positions your brand for growth.

woodframe.aboutBody: A brand that transforms the natural into the sophisticated — with calm, clarity, and elegance. Wood Frame brings natural wood design to a more sophisticated, modern, and sensorial level. It's not just about wood — it's about experience, aesthetics, and connection with nature.

essence.title: Purpose
essence.text: Connect people to nature through design.

essence.title: Mission
essence.text: Create pieces and identities that translate the natural with sophistication.

essence.title: Vision
essence.text: Be a reference in contemporary natural design.

essence.title: Values
essence.text: Naturalness, authenticity, artisanal quality, and refined aesthetics.

woodframe.positioningSubtitle: A brand for people who value design, nature, and sophistication — offering visual solutions and wood products with premium aesthetics and organic connection.
woodframe.personalityTitle: If Wood Frame were a person...
woodframe.toneBody: Light, refined, simple — without being basic. Sensorial and clear.
woodframe.creatorBody: Creativity, design, and aesthetics as the driving force. Wood Frame creates, transforms, and expresses — always with intention and beauty.
woodframe.sageBody: Knowledge, authority, and quality. A voice that guides with clarity, without arrogance — with depth and confidence.

message.title: What It Creates
message.text: A sense of comfort, desire, and trust.

woodframe.identityTitle: A visual language rooted in nature
woodframe.closingBody: Wood Frame is not just a design brand — it's a brand of perception. It transforms the natural into the sophisticated, creating an identity that is both simple and memorable.
woodframe.closingFootnote: Everything — from Instagram to the product — must convey calm, aesthetics, and quality.
woodframe.ctaTitle: Looking for a brand rooted in nature and elegance?
woodframe.ctaBody: Let's craft an identity that blends natural beauty with modern sophistication.
